patch.value: Move meet/event/remind calendar shortcuts from core surface into the builtin-calendar package as create sugar

The three calendar shortcut commands become builtin-calendar package-owned commands (or pm create --template sugar), removing 3 top-level core entries while keeping every flag; core keeps alias shims while the deprecation cycle runs. Duplicate check: PR#263 shipped the shortcuts; pm-ixoa is a calendar service collision, different concern.

meet/event/remind live in builtin-calendar (package-owned commands) with full flag parity incl. scheduling presets and relative-time parsing; core alias shims keep old spellings working; uninstalling the package surfaces the owning-package hint (pm-b3e9 pattern); calendar shortcut specs pass via aliases
